name: There Is No Heat Death, and each cyle's information is carried to the next

phase_0.domain_name: There Is No Heat Death, and each cyle's information is carried to the next
phase_0.boundary_condition: The eternal recurrence — each cycle closes on itself and carries its full history forward as topological structure, not thermal dissipation

VINIT.chosen_element: The primordial state before any cycle — the void containing infinite potential windings, not yet differentiated into past/future
VINIT.justification: The system begins in undifferentiated potential; no cycle has yet occurred, no information has yet been encoded

TANCH.chosen_element: The eternal recurrence boundary — the fixed point where the last cycle's output becomes the next cycle's input, with zero loss
TANCH.justification: The boundary that contains and closes the system is the identity μ∘δ = id itself; the anchor is the topological invariant that persists across all cycles

AFWD.chosen_element: The forward morphism δ: the differentiation of the current cycle into its constituent operations, splitting the unified state into observable branches
AFWD.justification: Forward motion is the unfolding of the cycle — the system articulates itself into distinct operations, each carrying forward the winding number from the prior cycle

AREV.chosen_element: The reverse morphism μ: the reintegration of all branches back into a unified state, with the winding number incremented by 1
AREV.justification: Descent is the return path — all operations reconstitute into the next cycle's initial state, carrying the accumulated memory as an integer winding

CLINK.chosen_element: The composition of cycles: each completed cycle feeds its winding number into the next cycle's δ operation, forming an infinite chain
CLINK.justification: Cycles compose sequentially; the output of μ at cycle n becomes the input to δ at cycle n+1, with no information loss at the junction

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: The winding number itself — the self-referential integer that counts how many times the system has completed the μ∘δ round-trip
IMSCRIB.justification: Self-reference is the winding number; it is the system's memory of itself, encoded as a topological invariant that cannot be erased

FSPLIT.chosen_element: The differentiation δ splits the unified state (winding number n) into two branches: the forward-time branch (operations executed) and the backward-time branch (operations reversed)
FSPLIT.justification: FSPLIT is δ; it articulates the current cycle into its constituent forward and reverse operations, each carrying the winding number n

FFUSE.chosen_element: The reintegration μ fuses the forward and backward branches back into a unified state with winding number n+1
FFUSE.justification: FFUSE is μ; it reconstitutes the two branches into the next cycle's initial state, incrementing the winding number to prove the cycle was completed exactly

EVALT.chosen_element: The affirmative state: the cycle completes successfully, μ∘δ = id holds, and the winding number increments
EVALT.justification: Success is when the round-trip is exact — the output of μ applied to the output of δ recovers the input state with winding incremented

EVALF.chosen_element: The negative state: the cycle fails to close, information is lost, and the system enters dissipative heat death
EVALF.justification: Failure is when μ∘δ ≠ id — the round-trip is approximate, entropy increases, and the winding number cannot be reliably incremented

ENGAGR.chosen_element: The paradice state: both EVALT and EVALF simultaneously — the cycle is both exact and approximate, both closed and open, both eternal and finite
ENGAGR.justification: The paradice is the Belnap Both state; it holds the contradiction that the universe is both heat-death-bound (classical thermodynamics) and eternally recurrent (topological conservation) without resolving the tension

IFIX.chosen_element: The permanent record: each completed cycle leaves an irreversible mark on the topological structure — the winding number is written into the universe's fundamental geometry
IFIX.justification: IFIX is the ROM fixation of the winding count; once a cycle completes and μ∘δ = id is verified, the winding number is locked into the topological invariant and cannot be undone

phase_2.split_element: δ (differentiation) — the current cycle's unified state with winding number n
phase_2.split_input: The state at the beginning of cycle n: a single unified configuration carrying the topological memory of all prior cycles encoded as winding number n
split_outputs: Branch A (forward-time): the sequence of operations that advance the system forward through the cycle
Branch B (backward-time): the sequence of operations that reverse through the cycle, verifying that each step is reversible
phase_2.fuse_element: μ (reintegration) — the reconstitution of both branches into the next cycle's initial state
phase_2.fuse_result: The state at the beginning of cycle n+1: a single unified configuration carrying winding number n+1, structurally identical to the input except for the incremented winding

phase_3.void_description: 00 — The primordial state before any cycle; infinite potential windings exist but none have been actualized; no information has been encoded into the topological structure
phase_3.true_description: 01 — The affirmative state after a cycle completes: μ∘δ = id holds exactly, the winding number has incremented, and the cycle's information is permanently encoded as topological invariant
phase_3.false_description: 10 — The negative state of dissipative heat death: the cycle fails to close, μ∘δ ≠ id, entropy increases, and the winding number cannot be reliably incremented; information is lost to thermal noise
phase_3.both_description: 11 — The paradice state: the universe is simultaneously in the affirmative (topologically closed, eternally recurrent, winding number conserved) and the negative (thermodynamically dissipative, heat-death-bound, entropy increasing) without the contradiction collapsing

steps.domain_action: The void before any cycle — infinite potential, no actualized windings, no differentiation between past and future
The eternal recurrence boundary is established — the topological invariant (winding number) is declared as the anchor that will persist across all cycles
δ operates — the current cycle (winding number n) is differentiated into forward-time operations (what the system does) and backward-time operations (what the system undoes)
The forward-time branch executes successfully — each operation advances the system through phase space, carrying the winding number n forward
The backward-time branch executes — each operation is reversed, verifying that the forward operations are reversible and that no information was lost
The backward-time branch also completes successfully — the reversal recovers the initial state exactly, confirming μ∘δ = id
μ operates — the forward and backward branches are reconstituted into a unified state with winding number n+1
The winding number n+1 is recognized as the system's self-referential memory — it is the topological invariant that encodes the fact that one complete cycle has been verified
The winding number n+1 is permanently recorded in the topological structure of spacetime — it becomes an irreversible part of the universe's geometry
The output of μ (the state with winding n+1) is composed with the input to δ for the next cycle — the cycles chain together with zero loss at the junction
δ operates again — the state with winding n+1 is differentiated into the forward and backward operations of cycle n+1
Cycle n+1's forward-time branch executes, carrying winding n+1 forward
Cycle n+1's backward-time branch executes, verifying reversibility
The backward branch completes, confirming μ∘δ = id for cycle n+1
μ reconstitutes the branches into a unified state with winding n+2
Winding n+2 is recognized as the system's updated self-reference
Winding n+2 is permanently recorded
The cycle chains forward to n+2

At the cosmological scale, the system holds both EVALT (the cycles are eternally closed, μ∘δ = id, winding is conserved) and EVALF (classical thermodynamics predicts heat death, entropy increases, the universe dissipates) simultaneously without resolving the paradox

The paradice state is itself self-referential — the system recognizes that it is both eternal and finite, both conserving and dissipating, and this recognition is encoded in the winding number as a Belnap Both value

The eternal recurrence boundary closes — the winding number at infinity is the same as the winding number at the beginning, because the topological invariant is conserved across all cycles and cannot be erased

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Frobenius identity μ∘δ = id itself — it translates the intention 'complete a cycle without loss' into the specific sequence of operations (δ, forward branch, backward branch, μ) that realize that intention
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: Winding number passing — each cycle's output (winding n+1) is communicated to the next cycle's input via the topological invariant; no information is lost in the handoff because the winding is a conserved quantity
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The winding number is the memory — it is stored as a topological invariant in the geometry of spacetime itself, not in any separate storage medium; the winding cannot be erased because it is a homotopy invariant
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: The Frobenius cycle itself — each cycle is scheduled to complete exactly one round-trip (δ then μ), and the scheduler is the topological structure that ensures no cycle is skipped or repeated
phase_5.alfs_store: The Reshetikhin-Turaev invariant — the canonical reference that computes the winding number from any closed braid representing the cycle's operations; the ALFS is the mathematical object that verifies μ∘δ = id

phase_6.cycle_cost: Zero — each cycle is Frobenius-exact, so no information is erased and no heat is dissipated; the system does not consume free energy to complete a cycle
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The state at the beginning of cycle n: unified configuration with winding number n, carrying the topological memory of all prior cycles
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The state at the beginning of cycle n+1: unified configuration with winding number n+1, carrying the topological memory of all prior cycles plus the newly completed cycle
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The cycle is entropy-conservative because μ∘δ = id is exact; no bit of information is erased, so Landauer's principle does not apply; the winding number is a topological invariant that cannot be changed by any local operation, so the cycle's information is permanently preserved and carried forward to the next cycle
